description: H100 7.5min baseline: DEPTH=8, 512-dim, batch=524K, 1368 steps
per-dimension MLP residual scaling (nGPT eigen LR) — massive regression, conflicts with Muon
low-rank VE (rank=128, 4x compression) — 38M params, regression +0.010, bottleneck too aggressive
cosine similarity logits replacing softcap — catastrophic, discards norm information
known-good H100 config: batch=262K, warmdown=0.6, FINAL_LR=0.05, softcap=12, window=384, 2820 steps
deeper-thinner 10×512: 60.8M params, 2407 steps
warmdown 0.6→0.7 for higher step count ← BEST
parallel attn+MLP (PaLM-style) — regression, attn→MLP info flow matters at this scale
softcap 12→15 — flat, 12 is optimal regardless of step count
12×384 (46.4M params, 2608 steps) — worse, 512-dim width is essential
stochastic depth (p_max=0.2) — adds noise without throughput gain, model already well-regularized
Muon LR 0.04→0.03 — lower LR for higher step count, -0.002 ← BEST
Muon LR 0.03→0.02 — flat, 0.03 is optimal
batch 262K→131K — 4485 steps but too noisy, regression +0.005
all-short window — regression, 3 long-context layers (SSSL) are needed
7S+3L (long at end) — spread SSSL is better than concentrated
WD 0.2→0.1 — marginal improvement ← BEST
embedding LR 0.6→0.4 — marginal regression, 0.6 better
DEPTH 11 (68.2M params, 2204 steps) — flat, 10 is optimal
short window 384→256 — tighter local attention, marginal improvement ← BEST
short window 256→192 — too tight, 256 is optimal
x0_lambdas 0.2→0.15 — regression, less input skip hurts
x0_lambdas 0.2→0.25 — marginal improvement ← BEST
x0_lambdas 0.25→0.3 — regression, 0.25 is optimal
embedding LR 0.6→0.8 — flat, 0.6 is fine
warmdown 0.7→0.75 — slight regression
FINAL_LR_FRAC 0.05→0.03 — marginal improvement
FINAL_LR_FRAC 0.03→0.01 — marginal improvement ← BEST
FINAL_LR_FRAC 0.01→0.0 — 0.01 is optimal
RoPE base 10000→5000 — marginal regression, default is fine
EMA (beta=0.99) for eval — regression, EMA captures too much variation during pretraining
Muon momentum 0.95→0.93 — marginal regression, 0.95 is optimal
GQA n_kv_head=2 — regression +0.005, KV capacity is essential at this scale
tiny warmup 0.5% — regression, model benefits from full LR from start
NS steps 5→7 — identical result, 5 is already converged
Muon momentum 0.95→0.93 — marginal regression
seed 42→0 — seed 42 is better, variance ~0.002
deep supervision (aux loss at layer 5) — regression, extra FLOPs costly
focal loss (gamma=1) — changes training objective, hurts CE/BPB
WD 0.1→0.0 — WD is needed, +0.005 regression
GELU replacing ReluSquared — non-sparse activation much worse, +0.015
c_proj init zeros→small random — zero init is better
9×512 (57.7M, 2630 steps) — fewer layers hurts, 10 is optimal
10×640 DBS=64 (85.9M, 1764 steps) — wider model beats 10×512!
10×640 DBS=128 (85.9M, 1790 steps) — better GPU utilization ← BEST
Muon LR 0.03→0.04 at 640-dim — regression, 0.03 optimal
warmdown 0.7→0.75 at 640-dim — regression
batch 262K→524K at 640-dim — only 905 steps, much worse
